props.name: alt
props.description: Provide alt text when the avatar is used without a name next to it.

props.name: size
props.type: number | { narrow?: number; regular?: number; wide?: number; }
props.description: The size of the avatar in pixels.

props.name: square
props.description: If true, the avatar will be square instead of circular.

props.name: srcTransformer
props.description: Optional function to transform the src URL before rendering. Receives the original src and the resolved numeric size in CSS pixels. Useful for appending query parameters for HiDPI/Retina support.

props.name: statusIcon
props.description: Renders a status icon overlay positioned at the bottom-right of the avatar.
